Spellbook Raises $50m Series B led by Khosla Ventures
entries.snippet: Today we’re announcing our Series B financing led by Keith Rabois at Khosla Ventures, including participation from Threshold Ventures, Inovia, Bling Capital and Moxxie Ventures.

entries.title: Introducing New Precedents: Stories on Law in the Age of AI
Spellbook’s Academic Partner Program Launches with 50+ Law Schools
GPT-5 is Now Live in Spellbook
entries.snippet: We’ve been collaborating with OpenAI to be one of the first companies in the world to launch GPT-5 in our products. After testing GPT-5 against contracting use cases, we think a new universe of capabilities are about to open up.

entries.title: Contract Prompt Library
entries.snippet: Pick from ready-to-use prompts, discover features in context, and get helpful follow-ups as you go.

entries.title: AI in Legal Departments: 2025 Benchmarking Report
entries.snippet: AI is no longer a future topic for legal departments. It’s reshaping how legal teams get work done today.
